title: premna debiana
intro: Premna debiana, also known as Premna or Sefwi tea tree, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Premna debiana lie in its essential oils, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Premna debiana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and exhibit antibacterial properties, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Premna debiana can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing its leaves in hot water, or as an essential oil through steam distillation, which is then used in aromatherapy and skincare products.
